mnemonics.title: Protocol Pin Purpose
mnemonics.content: I Squared C, Simple and Cheap (I²C - two wires, good for many sensors). SPI, Speed and Peripherals Interfacing (SPI - faster, full-duplex). UART, You Are Really Talking (UART - simple serial chat between two devices).

mnemonics.title: Raspberry Pi Model Selection
mnemonics.content: ZEG - Zero for Energy-saving sensor nodes, Enhanced (3B+) for Gateway roles, Giant (4B) for Edge computing

mnemonics.title: GPIO Pin Types
mnemonics.content: PODS - Power pins (3.3V/5V), Output digital pins, Data protocol pins (I2C/SPI/UART), Signal ground pins

mnemonics.title: Python GPIO Libraries Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: Raw-to-Ready: sysfs (raw) -> RPi.GPIO (standard) -> gpiozero (simplified) -> Automation frameworks (advanced)
